name: RemoteCtrl — Automate & Record
description: Hand off active browser tabs to RemoteCtrl AI or record browser workflows into reusable automation.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ws://127.0.0.1:45456 http://127.0.0.1:45456 ws://localhost:45456 http://localhost:45456;
